hc48b2fb9g72a1g46c7g8c53gfc16c01204f9: I wonder what Lorroakan will have me do first? Complex magic, no doubt.
h8b2cfe03g028dg48eega1a2g57143b5d75a2: My Thunderwave will make quick work of any goblin - just you wait.
h96fa8f0bgaf94g443fgadf1g4c84bf648783: I can spare but a moment - Baldur's Gate awaits! Oh, I can almost smell the city.
h5d29d5d2gf3d9g4460g951bg18cafbb55ef4: You're cheerful for someone about to abandon his kin.
h184af6f2ga13ag4ce9g927fg549f9f955ead: Well, you're here, aren't you? You can help them if you want.
h95f74a7bgfcb9g4de3gb825g44048ef2a92a: I don't believe in sacrifices for a lost cause.
hf0ad3981g600eg447eg832eg9a5ce694dc2d: We're leaving for Baldur's Gate. And we will make it.
hf558102ag93bcg4b20gb305gacc9bd4ce23e: Hold on. Why are you so eager to reach the city?
ha9fcd00fgfb50g46e2ga128g98d62aaa06e7: Tch. You're as bad as Lia.
he4ad0c57g54e3g408ag8555gbcb9e4c70231: And I think one of her is quite enough in my life. Good day to you.
ha4cfcd87g7dd2g42e0gac4bg6d50ea612ee1: There's every chance you'll die on the road.
h53b22095g30c0g4711gb7d8ge1bd8f354f39: Please. I can handle myself. It's others that are the issue.
hb6957b96g5be1g4ea7g86b5g349e36eadeae: You are looking at Lorroakan's newest apprentice.
hc5cf1562g1794g45d9g8ee6g111313d411a0: Yes - that Lorroakan. The greatest wizard in Baldur's Gate.
h62d85be4ge892g4b18g80cbgafb852b20df2: I've heard that name before. A young man, yes? Lives in Ramazith's tower in the upper city?
ha3ef36d0g4c4bg4a95g80dfg987504663bed: Word in Waterdeep has it he's a bit of a cad. But you say he's an accomplished wizard?
h6b7bbe4eg0607g4243gb7e8gd3ed88f20259: Of course he is! The greatest spell caster along the Sword Coast. As if I'd settle for a lesser mentor.
h3c3685b8gd273g4b56g92c2g74b139cb8ee8: In that case, I'd very much appreciate it if you could arrange an introduction should we reach the city.
hf820c251g608bg412eg999egc49f8fa99eb7: Good idea: powerful acquaintances never hurt.
hccb29195gfb85g48adg878egce27bbcba687: If it's powerful acquaintances you're after, you have to look no further than yours truly.
h9c909c4egfb5bg431agb790g68c42fdc7960: Few can match me - in either magic or talent.
h553aa89agf2beg426eg8fc3gb3d7f4e98556: In years to come, you will boast of this meeting - I can assure you. May we meet again in Baldur's Gate, my friend.
hbe4e24b0g1b63g478dgb66fgb22943970bfc: Hold on. I'm not sure about this Lorroakan.
he36c9291g667bg465bg9c3agd1505a6c2fec: Don't be fooled by mere gossip! The by-products of ignorance and jealousy.
h1b4e755fgce72g4fcfgaf17g80e74713ea2b: We need to go. We have a more pressing problem, remember?
hcee8a8e4gc474g44bcg9cdegc08efcb83346: Merely planning ahead. Besides, never hurts to befriend a wizard.
h7f5410bdg077dg405dg8ee0gb85caf168f42: In that case, it is I you should befriend.
h62bacc97g2e3ag4c9dg884dg910394d859e8: I've heard stories about Lorroakan - not all of them good.
hdc4303f1g0208g4604g9924g570aed63c251: Common gossip! The by-products of ignorance and jealousy.
h56c53097g828fg46cegba7ega4c2847f7cd1: I've admired Lorroakan for years. Never dreamed he'd answer my letter.
h22dc4747gacfdg49c5gb603g929013eccfa6: But I've worked myself to the bone for this. Few can match me - in either magic or talent.
h576cd6abg0868g485bg9182g1d33cd1d1617: The names 'Rolan' and 'Lorroakan' will be known far and wide. You'll see.
h04823bc6g4ee9g4650g856fge02e3c1b3b06: Never heard of him. Who is he?
hd14afd73gb4deg44abg8225ga21ba35c9c5d: What? You don't know of him? I've admired him for years.
he14bebe6g7ff8g44a0g934bg7353a8064df9: Both his magic and political sway are forces to be reckoned with.
hfcd74ba6gf45eg4268gae9fgad5905dec665: Rest assured, the names 'Rolan' and 'Lorroakan' will be known to you soon enough. You'll see.
h4d589c48gcb3bg4469g9bb9gf92065ca67cf: Forgive me. Of course someone like you wouldn't know.
h8efdf8c7g8b3ag4463gae9fg0a4dffc5e842: Lorroakan was a friend of my father. He'd make a fine tutor.
h40d8f4dbg0720g429dg8435g2b6dc4fce1b2: His name is known far and wide, I see.
h7c97b3b8g6223g4ff2gb72bg5329c6aa583e: Few can match him in terms of raw power and talent. Until now, that is.
h0416cb2bga970g457cgbc01ge521d6b9ceb9: Is this Lorroakan of Ramazith's Tower?
h5b2ae3a8g95d2g4147gb12dg195e3ebce61e: I've heard he's quite the scoundrel.
h235d0721gb49fg4d79g8452g9eacac4ba892: Common gossip! The by-products of ignorance and jealousy.
hb894f2c2g2e8ag4139gba6cg54e99bbf244f: Perhaps the right master can rid you of your arrogance.
haba0a7d2g2cf7g4067ga4fbgd0144bac05ad: Please - this is confidence, not arrogance.
h4334db4fgb118g4d51g980cg549ce1f3737a: But thank you for your concern. It was touching.
hd4a77a9bgd991g489agacd3gdb551d076b05: You made the right choice. This place isn't safe.
h4d633eafg869bg4301ga4c2gb555fd16f460: Quite right. Lia can be stubborn at times.
hb7fd1204g330fg4449ga8e9g57aaeb4c9fd8: This place, and its people, are lost. The only way we'll make it to Baldur's Gate is on our own.
h35e7ab42gbee0g4398gb60bgd7a7f6bd2138: And we will make it. I know it.
h37673c6cg7a76g4465g8e94gc0f372c3503b: Other than a desire to avoid impending death?
hc7c7eca3g490fg45f6g8e62g7fd9e13c22fa: Why burden yourself with companions? You should slip away - alone.
hb19abd9ag50b7g4f59g8c90g8886cc70e029: ... but I could never leave Lia behind, as irksome as she may be.
h8d48b33eg7132g498dga89bg4587f69bb812: If only she understood. The longer we wait, the longer the horrors of the wilds imperil us.
hbd91198cgee29g44dega5bagb91a863a83fe: Baldur's Gate isn't going anywhere. Why the hurry?
hd2c4f7fdgc4cag4adeg923fgd73381b1e2bc: I have been offered an apprenticeship by none other than Lorroakan.
h8bef7d9ag75feg40e8g98a5g11a6b18f5cce: Yes - that Lorroakan. The greatest wizard in Baldur's Gate. This will change everything.
hb2f2c728g4eddg40e0g8844g2186878012c1: You don't wish to help your fellow tieflings?
h47ba66a4gb64bg4704ga248g2ad39b1fa932: If we stop and help every wounded foal, we'll end up dead, or worse. Lia just can't see it.
h2b515d58gee1fg44fcgb4aage40847fd1644: We must leave soon. My apprenticeship with the wizard begins shortly.
h42978ddbg5111g4162gae60g3003fde8bc20: If you want to go, then go.
hc1546222g9f2eg40a5g880fg1ad37cf48631: Bah. I couldn't abandon her. No matter how prestigious the apprenticeship.
hd1969918g532fg499bgb58egf0f41664a842: I'm to study under Lorroakan, you see.
hce5378d0g722fg4653gb377g1ce76840e45e: I've heard the Elfsong Tavern makes a mean bowl of stew.
h69491472ga244g4849g8b83gc1e2a6530373: You're leaving? Good. Save your own skin to fight another day.
h819f1129g7cb8g495fg9627g5a3742127fda: What's so special about Baldur's Gate? Everyone here is so focused on it.
h487ffc65g2250g4cbdga5b6g7c01cde97be7: You are in for a treat, my otherwordly friend. There is no city in the realms like Baldur's Gate.
h0861fbb3gc482g40c2g9283g17653aa9c400: From its sights, to its smells, to the fortunes you can make. I myself am set to make history there...
h052d167ag1fe9g4a26g8dbag8f4a063aa6ed: ... as apprentice to Lorroakan, the greatest wizard in Baldur's Gate. This will change everything.
hfa37a413gedabg4a20g8645g6dee5d425ab0: The aroma of the Outer City is pretty unique.
hfff3990fgec26g4bb3g999age8f30c4b17a1: As if I would be found in such a place. No, I am destined for greater things.
hf0a34c56g9313g4af4ga8f7gc513d9588b58: We should have left by now. Damnation.
ha8ad6566g36d9g41a5gabb4g6907107ae228: Instead we're just sitting here - practically begging to be attacked. Staying is a mistake.
h09bb5ecfgc41cg4481g9dabg7a67af1f3e8f: You're doing the right thing. The tieflings need help.
h9fb6fc6fg4dbbg4d14g91b9g3f1b4a8427e8: You're doing the right thing. The others need help.
h63e6511ag70ceg410cgaba3g93e74ce18159: And what about us? There's every chance we've doomed ourselves by helping these people.
hcab1b8cagef62g4fbfga920g3bf7fb72c5d0: We will end up fodder for some goblin's blade - all because Lia insists on helping every wounded foal we see.
hc5aef69dg97e2g4505g8d0fg8fa2fd11c2e7: Our best chance to make it to Baldur's Gate is on our own. This place is lost.
hf10d8aa3g040ag499bgafe6g4762fc0044c3: My apprenticeship with Lorroakan begins shortly. I cannot be late.
hd66253f5g4bb0g4fc3gafdag75c5850905f6: Leave on your own. Why wait?
h3a22d4d7g0c3fg4e18g8804g66d6cb812b5b: Worrying won't help. I'm sure you'll be fine.
ha106a8d2g9d4fg4268g81d5g6ca604f5d26c: Of course I will be. As if there was any doubt.
hc47600f3g0345g4d46gab95g226cd01da34c: Standing by your people is never a mistake.
hae9b1a66g9fabg4b72g8021g95684578e299: It is if we end up dead.
h82202567gfa82g48fdg85ddgb0975c573de8: So eager to go to Baldur's Gate - do they even welcome tieflings?
h102c3f45g2c55g49d4ga18dg45be100d419b: More than most. A few strangers may stare - but they'll keep their daggers sheathed.
h88cbbdb2g9034g4c8eg91c0g1ede1bc5fcc3: I'll be warmly received, besides. You are looking at Lorroakan's newest apprentice.
